meta.title: RuBy, Developer
meta.description: Portfolio of RuBy, ERP/e-commerce integration (Sage X3, Odoo, PrestaShop, Shopify), data flow architecture, AI & autonomous agents development. Master in Big Data at Epitech.

hero.title: RuBy
hero.tagline: ERP module developer // FLOW ARCHITECT // Endangered developer
hero.subtitle: From order flows to autonomous agents, I connect systems and program their intelligence.

items.title: IRIS Mediaschool
items.description: Two years at IRIS Mediaschool building technical and digital foundations, from coding to UI, from business logic to creative tools.

items.title: Econocom
items.description: Apprenticeship alongside IRIS. Deployments, infrastructure, technical support, first exposure to complex enterprise environments.

items.title: CESI
items.description: Studies at CESI, strengthening software development, project management and application architecture foundations.

items.title: Sodilog
items.description: First data flow architectures: e-commerce ↔ ERP synchronization, Shopify and PrestaShop APIs, order tracking setup.

items.title: Epitech
items.description: Expert Master in Artificial Intelligence and Big Data at Epitech, designing autonomous agents, decision models, and large-scale data pipelines.

items.title: Sodilog
items.description: Design of advanced data flow architectures, integration of E-commerce ↔ Sage X3, development of tools and AI agents for business optimization.

expertise.title: EXPERTISE
expertise.subtitle: Stack & integration
expertise.intro: At Sodilog, I designed end-to-end data flow architectures: from an order placed on PrestaShop or Shopify to its synchronization in Sage X3, as well as interconnecting client Odoo instances with our ERP

blocks.title: ERP & Data Flow Integration
blocks.description: Order flow architecture between e-commerce platforms (PrestaShop, Shopify) and ERP systems (Sage X3, Odoo). Real-time stock tracking, bidirectional synchronization of products and pricing, logistics traceability. Web orders are automatically injected into the ERP with no manual intervention.

blocks.title: App & API Development
blocks.description: Design and implementation of data bridges to ensure interoperability between e-commerce platforms (Shopify, PrestaShop, Odoo) and Sodilog’s ERP. Shopify apps (Node.js) and API connectors, REST APIs for data exchange between heterogeneous systems, including file tracking, transfer and full data flow management, as well as reconciliation processes.

agents.title: AI & AGENTS
agents.subtitle: Agent philosophy
agents.intro: As part of my Big Data Master at Epitech, I work on agent-based systems. The goal is not just to use AI models, but to build systems capable of making decisions in real and constrained environments.

principles.title: WHY AN AGENT?
principles.description: An agent goes beyond a classic script. Instead of executing a fixed sequence of actions, it adapts its behavior based on observations. In ERP flows or complex business processes, this difference becomes essential to handle uncertainty.

principles.title: HOW I DESIGN THEM
principles.description: I always start from the business need before the technology. I define a simple loop: objective, context, possible actions, constraints. Only then do I choose tools (LLMs, rules, APIs). I prioritize readable, testable and controllable systems over opaque architectures.

principles.title: IN MY CONTEXT
principles.description: I apply them to real-world problems: ERP flow automation, data reconciliation, or intelligent order routing. The idea is to build autonomous building blocks that improve existing systems without making them unstable or unpredictable.

aviation.title: AVIATION
aviation.description: In flight, every exchange matters: no room for approximation. I apply this same rigor when building reliable and clean systems.

astronomy.title: ASTRONOMY
astronomy.description: Astronomy teaches scale. When you look at a star 400–500 light years away, you are looking into the past. Information systems have their own time scale: past data still shapes present decisions.

volleyball.title: VOLLEYBALL
volleyball.description: At the net, timing and team trust make the difference. Reading the game, anticipating, communicating — but most importantly: the third half.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.subtitle: Ready to collaborate?
contact.description: For a project, a development mission, or just a conversation,

sections.title: Site publisher
sections.content: The website rb-rubydev.fr is published by RuBy. Contact: contact@rb-rubydev.fr

sections.title: Hosting
sections.content: The website is hosted on a virtual private server (VPS). For any hosting-related inquiry, contact contact@rb-rubydev.fr

sections.title: Intellectual property
sections.content: All content on this website (texts, visuals, code) is the exclusive property of RuBy. Any reproduction, even partial, is prohibited without prior authorization.

sections.title: Liability
sections.content: RuBy strives to keep the information on this website up to date and accurate. However, no guarantee is given regarding the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the published information.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.content: This website does not use tracking or advertising cookies. Minimal local data may be stored (audio preferences, easter eggs) via localStorage in your browser only.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.content: This website does not collect any personal data. No forms, no tracking, no third-party cookies are used.

sections.title: Local storage
sections.content: Some preferences (volume, theme) and game data (found easter eggs) are stored locally in your browser via localStorage. This data never leaves your device.

sections.title: Server logs
sections.content: The server may store technical logs (IP address, visited pages, timestamps) for security and debugging purposes, in compliance with applicable regulations. These logs are not used for commercial purposes.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you email contact@rb-rubydev.fr, your address and message content will only be used to respond to you.

sections.title: Rights
sections.content: In accordance with GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, and delete your data. Contact contact@rb-rubydev.fr for any request.
